title: [Molecular Biology] 任务 #9309

cache_hit_details.title: Ginsenoside Rg1 alleviates chronic inflammation-induced neuronal ferroptosis and cognitive impairments via regulation of AIM2 - Nrf2 signaling pathway.
cache_hit_details.reason: 论文研究的是人参皂苷Rg1对神经炎症和认知障碍的影响，与HEK-293T细胞中Nrf2蛋白的Western Blot检测问题无关。

cache_hit_details.title: Activation of NRF2 by epiberberine improves oxidative stress and insulin resistance in T2DM mice and IR-HepG2 cells in an AMPK dependent manner.
cache_hit_details.reason: 论文研究EPI激活NRF2改善氧化应激和胰岛素抵抗，未涉及WB检测NRF2信号弱的技术问题。

cache_hit_details.title: Salidroside Mediated the Nrf2/GPX4 Pathway to Attenuates Ferroptosis in Parkinson’s Disease

cache_hit_details.title: KLF4 regulates trophoblast function and associates with unexplained recurrent spontaneous abortion.
cache_hit_details.reason: 论文研究KLF4在滋养层功能及复发性流产中的作用，与Nrf2蛋白的Western Blot检测问题无关。

摘要: Nuclear Factor Erythroid 2-Related Factor 2 (NRF2) is important for the expression of genes associated with oxidative stress. The levels of NRF2 are controlled by Kelch-like ECH-associated protein 1 (KEAP1)-dependent degradation. 摘要: Targeting ferroptosis, a unique cell death modality triggered by unrestricted lipid peroxidation, in cancer therapy is hindered by our incomplete understanding of ferroptosis mechanisms under specific cancer genetic contexts.
